entry.title: IDC HT940214D0002 (P00040) awarded to EXPRESS SCRIPTS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::OT::IGF THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE INTO THE CONTRACT CHANGE 133 OF THE TRICARE POLICY MANUAL (TPM133) AND CHANGE 112 OF THE TRICARE REIMBURSEMENT MANUAL (TRM112) ENTITLED, CY15 REIMBURSEMENT AND CODING UPDATES 14-002.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: DIRECT HEALTH AND MEDICAL INSURANCE CARRIERS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HT940214D0002 (P00044) awarded to EXPRESS SCRIPTS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::OT::IGF THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO ADOPT THE USE OF CALENDAR YEAR QUARTERS TO DETERMINE BOTH THE DATA CONTENT AND MAILING SCHEDULE OF BENEFICIARY EXPLANATION OF BENEFITS (EOBS) FOR THE DURATION OF THE CONTRACT. IT ALSO DOCUMENTS A DEVIATION REQUESTED BY ESI (JEC-CM-03152, APRIL 22, 2015) TO TOM CHAPTER 23, SECTION 4, 4, WHICH THE GOVERNMENT HAS GRANTED THAT ALLOWS BENEFICIARY PRESCRIPTION ACTIVITY FROM APRIL, 2015 TO BE INCLUDED IN THE INITIAL EOB GENERATED UNDER THIS CONTRACT. ADDITIONALLY, THE MODIFICATION REVISES THE TEXT OF TWO CDRLS TO CORRECT ERRORS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: DIRECT HEALTH AND MEDICAL INSURANCE CARRIERS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
